final_arbitration.reasoning: Both teachers read the same SURG20 wall-mount recording of V_8.mov with very similar phase structures. Claude 136s (low-confidence, sonnet-4) vs GPT-4o 141s (moderate-confidence, gpt-4o-2024-11-20). The 5s delta is well within the expected noise floor for this recording format. Midpoint reconciliation is appropriate.
Recomputed from reconciled time: 600 - 138.5 - 3.5 = 458.0. Delta of 4.0 FLS between teachers is among the smallest in the entire series.

knot_assessments.notes: Surgeon's knot - both teachers agree on double wrap. GPT-4o explicitly called right-led; Claude's confidence was low on hand leadership.
Single throw with hand switch - both confirm alternating pattern.
Single throw switched back. Both confirm secure knot stack.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Both teachers agree - no visible gap, complete closure, no avulsion. Compact knot stack with short tails.

consensus_score.technique_summary: V_8 (SURG20 wall-mount) is a strong top-tier performance at ~138s, among the fastest confirmed times on non-RCA-lab equipment. Both teachers converge on: fast needle load (~5-7s), efficient suture placement (~18-28s), consistent throw pattern (20/20/28 Claude, 13/20/28 GPT-4o), and a prolonged 45s cut phase that dominates end-of-task time. Drain outcome is clean (no gap, no avulsion, secure knot). This is a cross-station skill transfer demonstration from the V11-V14 RCA lab baseline.
improvement_suggestions: 45s cut phase is 33% of total time and remains the primary bottleneck - improve tail organization before cutting
Third throw at 28s is 8s slower than throws 1-2 - tightening technique could be more economical
Station is oblique wall-mount - direct camera angle would improve scoring confidence dramatically
strengths: Clean drain closure with no visible gap
Efficient first and second throws at ~20s each
Fast needle load demonstrating skill transfer across equipment

critique_reasoning: Round 1 early-stopped due to very_strong teacher agreement (Δ FLS = 4.0, Δ time = 5s, identical outcomes). No arbitration needed beyond midpoint reconciliation of the small timing delta.

_meta.provenance: Generated after forensic reconciliation of conflated V8/V18 records. Replaces the orphaned early V8_video_gpt-4o standalone score.
